_doc: Asymmetric-tails partition of iv_percentile into 5 bands. Edges are FROZEN — never change without bumping version. Labels are derived display-only and may evolve without invalidating cohorts.
_notes: iv_percentile range is [0, 100] inclusive on both ends; band 4 hi=100.01 makes the top edge inclusive while keeping the partition exhaustive.
NULL iv_percentile -> NULL iv_band (forward-only doctrine: missing stays missing).
iv_band is the canonical cohort dimension going forward. The legacy iv_regime label is derived for backward compat: bands 0-1 -> CHEAP_VOL, band 2 -> NEUTRAL_VOL, bands 3-4 -> EXPENSIVE_VOL.
iv_rank_band is parked. When/if introduced it becomes a parallel column with its own spec file.
